name: Harrisons Malayalam Limited
summary: Harrisons Malayalam Limited primarily engages in the plantation and selling of tea, rubber, and pineapples in India and internationally. It operates through three segments: Tea, Rubber, and Others. The company offers CTC and orthodox, custom blended, and organic teas; and rubber products, including latex, smoked sheets, crepes, and crumb/block rubber products. It also produces cardamom, malabar pepper, cloves, nutmeg, cocoa, vanilla, arecanut, coconut, and banana, as well as coffee. In addition, the company trades in and exports its products, as well as products from other growers. Harrisons Malayalam Limited was incorporated in 1978 and is based in Kochi, India.
